name: Agave
long_description:
We’re modernizing construction, a $12T global industry run by siloed software built 20-40 years ago (on-prem, no APIs, no mobile access, etc.). 


Construction is at a generational inflection point. 41% of the workforce retires by 2031, and AI is forcing contractors to increase efficiency without increasing headcount. 


At Agave, we're building the financial operations platform for construction contractors. We reverse-engineered 11+ proprietary ERPs to build a modern API layer, then built critical products contractors needed on top: ERP Sync and AP Automation, with 4 more products coming out this year. Our goal is to be the financial operations platform every construction company in North America runs on. 


We're backed by Accel and Y Combinator, with angels from Plaid, Procore, Autodesk, and PlanGrid. Our founding team worked together for 10 years at Graphiq (acq. Amazon) and Amazon before founding Agave.

These slides explain our company and market in more detail: https://www.figma.com/deck/nlpdpvRj3iS2qbPXqkMQz0
